---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What problem does this solve?

Describe the problem or workflow gap you're running into. A concrete use case is more useful than an abstract description.

## Proposed solution

Describe what you'd like to see. Be as specific as possible — config fields, UI changes, new step types, etc.

## Alternatives considered

Have you found a workaround? Are there other ways this could be addressed?

## Affected area

Which part of FlowForge does this touch? (check all that apply)

- [ ] Pipeline engine / step execution
- [ ] Step types (db_procedure, db_query, report, email, drive_upload)
- [ ] Email providers (SMTP / Gmail / M365)
- [ ] Report generation (Excel / PDF / CSV)
- [ ] Database connections (PostgreSQL / Oracle)
- [ ] Scheduler
- [ ] CLI
- [ ] Frontend / UI
- [ ] API
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other: ___

## Additional context

Any mockups, examples from other tools, or related issues.
